common.companyBadge: IT advisory for SMBs in Norway

home.heroTitle: Structure, Security and Control in Your IT Environment
home.heroSubtitle: We help small and medium-sized businesses gain control over users, devices, and data—with simple, secure, scalable solutions you can build on, and room for ongoing follow-up on risk and security.
home.foundationBody: SecCloudPath can also support businesses from day one by setting up practical digital basics in a secure and structured way.
foundationPoints: A secure and structured digital foundation

value.devicesDesc: See what’s in your environment and manage PCs, laptops, and mobile devices in a consistent way.
value.securityDesc: Use modern security practices that reduce risk without slowing down daily work.
value.usersDesc: Make onboarding, access changes, and offboarding predictable and easy to administer.
value.scaleDesc: Build an IT setup that supports growth, new hires, and new locations—without rework.
value.monitoringDesc: Keep security and systems visible over time—with alerts, light routines, and steady upkeep of policy and compliance.

home.whyLead: A structured setup turns IT from “something that happens” into something you can manage with confidence.
home.whyBody: When users, PCs, mobile devices, and security are managed as one system, you reduce risk and create a clear overview of who has access to what—and why. That also makes continuous follow-up easier, so gaps and changes don’t linger unnoticed.

whyPoints.riskDesc: Clear access rules and consistent device security.
whyPoints.timeDesc: Fewer manual tasks and fewer “special cases”.
whyPoints.controlDesc: Better visibility, simpler audits, and predictable changes.

home.ctaTitle: Ready to improve structure and security?
home.ctaBody: Get in touch for an informal conversation. We’ll help you map the current situation and suggest practical next steps.

services.title: Services
services.intro: SecCloudPath helps businesses build secure, structured, and manageable IT environments. The goal is simple: clearer access, safer devices, and less day-to-day friction.
services.ctaBody: We’ll help you identify the most valuable improvements and outline practical next steps.

items.iamDesc: Make access predictable and secure—so the right people can work, without unnecessary risk.
iamBullets: Secure access to systems and data
items.mdmDesc: Keep devices consistent, secure, and up to date—whether employees work from the office or on the move.
mdmBullets: Management of PCs, laptops, and mobile devices
items.msDesc: Get a structured setup across Microsoft 365 and security—optimized for daily work and long-term maintainability.
items.advisoryDesc: Practical guidance that fits your size, your needs, and your pace—focused on structure, security, and clarity.
items.foundationDesc: Get the essentials in place from the start with secure, structured support built for small and medium-sized businesses.
foundationBullets: Secure and structured startup support for SMBs
items.securityMonitoringDesc: Continuous follow-up on security and systems to detect and address risk early.

about.badge: IT advisory for SMBs in Norway
about.title: About SecCloudPath
about.intro: SecCloudPath helps businesses create secure, structured, and modern IT environments—focused on reducing complexity, improving security, and building a strong technical foundation for growth.
about.cardBody1: We work with small and medium-sized businesses that want more control over users, devices, and data—without turning IT into a large, ongoing project.
about.cardBody2: The result is an environment that is easier to manage day to day, more resilient to risk, and better prepared for change.
about.approachIntro: We keep things clear and structured. Practical improvements first—then consistent security and scalable patterns that hold up over time.

pillars.practicalDesc: Clear steps, minimal disruption, and outcomes that matter in daily work.
pillars.securityDesc: Reduce risk with modern controls that support how people actually work.
pillars.structureDesc: Consistent standards for users, devices, and access—less complexity over time.
pillars.scaleDesc: A foundation that supports growth, onboarding, and new needs without rework.

about.partnerTitle: A reliable IT partner for SMBs
about.partnerBody1: You get straightforward guidance, documentation you can rely on, and an IT environment built to be manageable—not fragile.
about.partnerBody2: Whether you need to establish structure from scratch or improve an existing setup, we focus on what creates lasting value.

contact.badge: Let’s talk about your IT needs
contact.title: Contact us
contact.intro: If you want a more secure and structured IT environment, we’d be happy to help. Send a message and we’ll get back to you for an informal conversation.
